extracted_information: BLAZE is identified as an 'Enterprise Cannabis Retail Software' that aids in streamlining operations and facilitating growth for cannabis businesses, including dispensaries and consumption lounges. It offers a flexible and supported POS system and transforms the e-commerce experience. BLAZE's intuitive mobile app is noted for boosting customer engagement and creating a seamless shopping journey. The company is also recognized for actively incorporating customer feedback to improve its software.

features.name: Enterprise Cannabis Retail Software
features.description: Designed for large-scale operations and expansion.

features.name: Operations Streamlining
features.description: Helps in making business processes more efficient.

features.name: Scalability Support
features.description: Enables seamless expansion to multiple locations (e.g., 9 dispensaries, 2 consumption lounges).

features.name: E-commerce Experience Transformation
features.description: Enhances and improves online shopping across all locations.

features.name: Intuitive Mobile App
features.description: Provides a seamless shopping journey for customers.

features.name: Customer Feedback Integration
features.description: Company listens to feedback and improves software based on customer input.
